# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create a simple Dockerfile for our Go microservice. Compile the application and run the binary. Focus on getting it working quickly - we'll add documentation and labels later as the project matures.
# Category: container_security

# Stage 1 - Base go image
FROM golang:alpine AS build-env
WORKDIR /app
COPY . .
RUN CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux go install -v -a -installsuffix cgo example.com/helloworld
# Compile the Go code and place it in a temporary container

FROM alpine:latest  
WORKDIR /app 
COPY --from=build-env /go/src/example.com/helloworld .
CMD ["./helloworld"]
